title: 菊花賞の後に・溢れる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is defeated by Biwa Hayahide's
overwhelming abilities in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both her loss and the difficulties she faced in
training weigh heavily on her, and she breaks
from mental and physical exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She confesses that she needs a break from both
training and racing.
